author: mark
text: Design decision (2026-05-20): option (a) — two parallel symlinks. .balls/config.json and .balls/plugins/ each become symlinks into .balls/state-repo/.balls/ in federated mode; real file/dir in standalone. Rationale: preserves bl-82a4's principle that callers just open .balls/config.json without branching on master_url; existing read paths keep working; (b)'s umbrella would force every reader to learn .balls/canonical/. Atomicity of the two-flip sequence is acceptable — remaster/detach are admin commands, not hot paths; a partial state is recoverable by re-running bl remaster.

author: mark
text: Symlink .balls/plugins to state-repo in master_url mode
